text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and then go for a short run. After that, I take a shower and have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My work starts at 9:00; I work from home as a graphic designer. I take a lunch break around noon and often go for a walk outside. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a series. I am usually in bed by 10:30. This routine helps me feel balanced and productive.
